instruction: Remove the accidental marker from the floating-islands sky. Move the large sun glow back toward the upper right, restore the purple roof on the castle tower, slim the little flagpole, and make the grass edge on the main island more visible. Preserve the waterfalls, bridge, and distant islands.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1600 1000">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="sky20" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#5aa8d8" />
      <stop offset="0.45" stop-color="#9fcfe6" />
      <stop offset="0.75" stop-color="#e6d8e8" />
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#fbe6d0" />
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="sun20" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.5">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#fffae8" /><stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#ffe6b0" stop-opacity="0.6" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#ffe6b0" stop-opacity="0" />

    <linearGradient id="grass20" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">

    <linearGradient id="rock20" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#8a6a52" /><stop offset="0.6" stop-color="#5a4232" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#3a2a1e" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="fall20" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#dffaff" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#aee0f0" stop-opacity="0.3" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="castle20" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#e8e0e8" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#b8acc0" />
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="cloud20" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18" /></filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width="1600" height="1000" fill="url(#sky20)" id="download-sv_040-rect-001" />
  <circle cx="1283" cy="240" r="280" fill="url(#sun20)" id="download-sv_040-circle-001" />
